always: Use expo-router for all navigation — no React Navigation
Import Supabase client from lib/supabase.ts only — never instantiate elsewhere
Enable RLS on every table before writing any query
Use expo-secure-store for auth tokens — never AsyncStorage
Use timestamptz for all Supabase timestamps — never timestamp
Use text + CHECK constraint for status columns — never Postgres enum (hard to migrate)
Generate types after every schema change: supabase gen types typescript --linked > src/types/supabase.ts
never: Never call supabase.auth.getSession() without checking the error — always destructure both data and error
Never store the Supabase service role key in the app — Edge Functions only
Never use React Navigation — expo-router only
Never mutate Zustand/state directly — always use actions
Never skip RLS on a new table — enable it at creation time
gotchas: Metro bundler cache causes phantom 'module not found' errors — npx expo start --clear fixes 80% of weird issues
Supabase Realtime on mobile requires explicit channel.unsubscribe() in useEffect cleanup or you leak connections on component unmount
EAS build ignores your local .env entirely — all secrets must be added to EAS Secrets in the dashboard
expo-router file-based routing: a file named (tab).tsx creates a group, not a screen named (tab)
Supabase Edge Functions have a ~150ms cold start on first call — not suitable for latency-sensitive paths
supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange fires on every app foreground — don't do heavy work inside it
iOS simulator does not support push notifications — always test on a real device for anything notification-related
Supabase Realtime postgres_changes requires the table to have REPLICA IDENTITY FULL for update payloads

folders.hooks/: data fetching hooks (wrap Supabase queries here)
folders.lib/supabase.ts: single Supabase client — import only from here
folders.types/supabase.ts: auto-generated Supabase types — never edit manually
folders.supabase/functions/: Deno Edge Functions — use service role for writes
